description: codebase-pilot hooks — auto health check + prompt tracking

hooks.command: echo '--- codebase-pilot ---' && codebase-pilot pack --compress --dry-run 2>/dev/null && echo '---' && codebase-pilot scan-secrets 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo '---' && codebase-pilot compare 2>/dev/null | head -10 || true
